title: Instant Motor-Claim Estimator
briefDescription: Build an AI agent that analyzes vehicle damage images and provides pre-approval cost estimates for insurance claims automatically.
deliverables: Computer vision model for damage detection

title: Crop Insurance Payout Agent
briefDescription: An intelligent agent that monitors satellite and weather data to automatically trigger payouts to farmers during drought conditions.

title: Health Insurance Policy Simplifier
briefDescription: An agent that answers coverage questions by analyzing complex health insurance policy documents using RAG and document AI.

title: Insurance Agent Sales Co-pilot
briefDescription: An intelligent agent that listens to client needs and suggests the most suitable insurance policies based on profitability and customer fit.

title: Fraudulent Travel Claim Detector
briefDescription: An agent that flags suspicious travel insurance claims by cross-referencing flight delays and hospital records using data forensics.

title: Life Insurance Risk-Profiler
briefDescription: An agent that adjusts life insurance premiums by analyzing social media activity and wearable data using behavioral analytics.

title: Auto-Renewal Negotiation Agent
briefDescription: An agent that negotiates with multiple insurance companies on behalf of a user to secure the best renewal rate.

title: Autonomous Interview Scheduler
briefDescription: An agent that negotiates interview times between recruiters and candidates via automated email and chat interactions.

title: Employee Burnout Predictor
briefDescription: An agent that analyzes Slack and email sentiment to flag employees at risk of attrition and burnout.

title: Vernacular Employee Training Bot
briefDescription: An agent that converts complex company policy PDFs into interactive voice-guided training modules in local languages.

title: Gamified Performance Feedback Agent
briefDescription: An agent that transforms monthly KPIs into interactive game dashboards for frontline workers in delivery and sales roles.

title: Internal Job-Match Agent
briefDescription: An agent that suggests internal projects to employees based on their skills, experience, and previous project history.

title: Internal Policy Ask-Me-Anything
briefDescription: An agent that answers employee queries on leave policies, maternity benefits, and perks by searching the company handbook.

title: Interview Bias-Detector Agent
briefDescription: An agent that reviews recorded interviews and flags potential gender, caste, or other biases in recruiter questions.

title: Airport Lounge Peak-Hour Predictor
briefDescription: An agent that predicts airport lounge crowding based on flight schedules and historical entry data patterns.

title: Smart Hotel Guest Preference Agent
briefDescription: An agent that scans guest history and autonomously sets room temperature, lighting, and amenities before check-in.

title: Airport VIP Concierge Agent
briefDescription: An agent that coordinates baggage handling, transport, and lounge access for VIP travelers using a unified dashboard.

title: Hospitality Sentiment Repair Agent
briefDescription: An agent that flags negative reviews in real-time and autonomously offers discounts or apologies to affected guests.

title: Multilingual Hotel Concierge Bot
briefDescription: An agent that helps international tourists book local transport and tours in their native language.

title: Preventative Maintenance Agent
briefDescription: An agent for hotels that predicts when AC, elevators, or other equipment need service based on usage logs.

title: Ayushman Bharat Fraud Detection Agent
briefDescription: An agent that monitors claim patterns to identify potential upcoding or ghost billing in private hospitals.

title: Vernacular Medical Prescription Parser
briefDescription: An agent that interprets handwritten digital prescriptions and explains dosage instructions in local languages.

title: Autonomous Patient Follow-up Agent
briefDescription: An agent that proactively messages patients post-surgery to track recovery metrics and alert doctors if symptoms worsen.

title: Lab Report Intelligence Agent
briefDescription: An agent that creates human-friendly summaries of raw diagnostic data and lab results for patient understanding.

title: Rural Health-Camp Logistics Agent
briefDescription: An agent that optimizes mobile clinic movement based on disease outbreak data and local road conditions.

title: Remote Patient Monitoring (IoT) Agent
briefDescription: An agent that monitors vital signs from IoT devices and automatically calls emergency services if readings cross danger thresholds.

title: Mental Health First-Aid Bot
briefDescription: An agent that provides immediate emotional support and mental health resources to users showing signs of stress and anxiety.

title: Smart Kitchen Waste Monitor
briefDescription: An agent that predicts daily food waste by analyzing sales data, weather patterns, and local events.

title: Automated Nutrition Label Generator
briefDescription: An agent that generates FSSAI-compliant nutrition labels from custom recipes with ingredient weights.

title: Voice-Based Inventory Agent
briefDescription: An agent that allows warehouse workers to update stock levels using voice commands in their native language.

title: Restaurant Competitor Price Watcher
briefDescription: An agent that monitors competitor dish prices across delivery apps and suggests price adjustments for the restaurant.

title: Hygiene Compliance Auditor
briefDescription: An agent that reviews kitchen photos to ensure staff are wearing proper safety equipment and maintaining cleanliness standards.

title: Cloud Kitchen Delivery-Time Optimizer
briefDescription: An agent that predicts optimal cooking start times so dishes finish exactly when the delivery rider arrives.

title: Hyper-Local Food Trend Agent
briefDescription: An agent that analyzes local social media to identify trending ingredients and dishes for the restaurant to feature.

title: UPI Dispute Resolution Agent
briefDescription: An agent that automates verification of failed UPI transactions between banking systems and merchants.

title: Micro-SaaS GST Filing Agent
briefDescription: An agent that reads invoice photos from small stores and automatically generates draft GSTR-1 tax filing documents.

title: Personal Wealth Tax-Saver Agent
briefDescription: An agent that analyzes bank statements to suggest investment options under 80C/80D tax reliefs to maximize savings.

title: Agricultural Loan Credit Scorer
briefDescription: An agent that predicts farmer creditworthiness using non-traditional data like crop history and soil health metrics.

title: Stock Market Sentiment Agentic Trader
briefDescription: An agent that monitors social media and news sentiment to autonomously adjust a mock portfolio's risk level.

title: Small Business Invoice Chaser
briefDescription: An agent that autonomously follows up with clients via email/calls about unpaid invoices with escalating urgency.

title: Real-time Budget Nudge Agent
briefDescription: An agent that monitors personal spending and sends humorous nudges when users overspend on food delivery apps.

title: Personalized Entrance Exam Coach
briefDescription: An agent that analyzes student mock-test errors and creates a custom 7-day revision plan tailored to their weaknesses.

title: AI Proctor for Low-Bandwidth Areas
briefDescription: An agent that monitors student exams using audio cues and low-resolution photos to detect cheating in bandwidth-limited areas.

title: College Admission Assistance Agent
briefDescription: An agent that helps Indian students find the best colleges based on their entrance exam rank, budget, and location preferences.

title: Automated Thesis Feedback Agent
briefDescription: An agent that checks student papers for structural flow, citation consistency, and grammar before submission.

title: Teacher's Lesson Plan Architect

title: Virtual Science Lab Assistant
briefDescription: An agent that guides students through virtual chemistry experiments and flags dangerous chemical combinations.

title: Peer-to-Peer Study Group Agent
briefDescription: An agent that automatically forms study groups among students based on complementary strengths and weaknesses.

title: Automated Inventory Replenishment Agent
briefDescription: An agent that monitors liquor and food levels in airport lounges and autonomously triggers restock orders to the warehouse.

title: Premium Guest Face-Recognition Entry
briefDescription: An agent that verifies lounge access using facial recognition to match against a premium member database.

title: Automated PII Leakage Scanner
briefDescription: A tool that scans public repositories and social media for leaked Personally Identifiable Information using NLP techniques.

title: Cross-Platform Identity Linker
briefDescription: An AI agent that correlates usernames and email patterns across social networks to build a complete digital presence view.

title: Corporate Attack Surface Mapper
briefDescription: A system that automatically identifies an organization's public-facing assets including forgotten subdomains and exposed servers.

title: AI-Powered Right to be Forgotten Audit
briefDescription: A tool that helps users find and remove their personal data from the web and automates data broker removal requests.

title: Social Engineering Risk Scorer
briefDescription: A model that analyzes public posts to calculate vulnerability scores for targeted spear-phishing attacks.

title: Geospatial Metadata Extractor
briefDescription: A tool that extracts GPS EXIF metadata from public images to map physical movement patterns.

title: Username Variation Engine
briefDescription: A tool that finds hidden accounts belonging to the same person across niche forums using fuzzy matching.

title: Dark Web Breach Monitor
briefDescription: A dashboard that alerts users the moment their credentials appear in a new database leak.

title: Visual Relationship Mapping
briefDescription: Graph-based visualization of connections between people, companies, and locations discovered through OSINT.

title: Sentiment & Disinformation Tracker
briefDescription: A real-time monitor that detects organized bot campaigns or negative rumors targeting a brand or individual.

title: AI PII Redactor for Public Datasets
briefDescription: A privacy filter that automatically masks PII in text documents and images before public upload or LLM training.

title: Shadow IT Discovery Bot
briefDescription: An OSINT bot that scans for unauthorized IoT devices and shadow dashboards exposed to the internet.

title: Metadata Forensic Suite
briefDescription: A file analyzer that detects hidden digital breadcrumbs in PDFs and Word documents for forensic investigation.

title: Automated Digital Footprint Tracker
briefDescription: A tool that aggregates data from GitHub, forums, Instagram, and Pastebin to build a unified person profile.

title: Real-time Vishing Prevention
briefDescription: A mobile app that flags suspicious calls using voice analysis and scam database cross-referencing.

title: Automated Job Vacancy Discovery System
briefDescription: An AI system that automatically identifies job vacancies from company career pages and lists them on the DEET portal.

title: Resume-to-DEET Instant Registration System
briefDescription: A system that automatically converts a jobseeker's resume into a DEET profile within seconds.

title: Offline-to-Online Jobseeker Registration
briefDescription: A solution to register jobseekers without internet access during job fairs or walk-ins.

title: AI-Based Smart Job Matching Engine
briefDescription: An intelligent matching engine that connects the right jobseekers with the right employers.

title: Automated Employer Registration System
briefDescription: An AI system that automatically captures employer details from company websites or registration documents.

title: AI Job Fair Tracking Dashboard
briefDescription: A system to track complete job fair lifecycle data for jobseekers and employers with real-time analytics.

title: AI-Based Resume Validation & Fraud Detection
briefDescription: A system that verifies jobseeker details and detects duplicates and fake experience patterns.

title: Intelligent Jobseeker Engagement System
briefDescription: An AI assistant that helps jobseekers stay active and apply for jobs through recommendations and coaching.

title: AI-Based Skill Gap Identification System
briefDescription: Identify missing skills preventing jobseekers from getting hired by comparing resumes with job requirements.

title: AI-Based Vacancy Success Prediction System
briefDescription: Predict hiring success probability for each job posting using historical data and predictive analytics.

title: Intelligent GST Reconciliation Using Knowledge Graphs
briefDescription: Build a Knowledge Graph-based reconciliation engine that bridges taxpayer GSTN data to detect ITC mismatches and discrepancies.

title: Clustering of 256-dimensional feature vectors
briefDescription: Develop efficient clustering algorithms for high-dimensional feature vectors optimized for hardware-constrained environments.

title: Efficient 1-to-many similarity search on high-dimensional vectors
briefDescription: Implement fast similarity search algorithms for high-dimensional data with hardware acceleration capabilities.

title: Individual cable isolation from classified LiDAR data
briefDescription: Process LiDAR point cloud data to identify and isolate individual cables for infrastructure monitoring.

title: AI-Powered Student Progress Dashboard
briefDescription: Build an intelligent dashboard that tracks student progress across multiple subjects with AI-generated insights and personalized learning recommendations.

title: IoT-based Smart Waste Management System
briefDescription: Design and develop an IoT-based smart waste management system that uses sensors to monitor waste levels in bins, optimize collection routes, and provide analytics dashboards for waste management agencies to improve sustainability and reduce costs.
